rawInstruction: with green, make a slip knot and ch 14; sl st in the first ch you made, to join the piece in a circle; [ch 3, sl st in the next ch of the circle] 14 times (work your last sl st into the st that joined the circle) (14 chain-loops made)
summary: Chain 14, join to form a circle, then create 14 chain-3 loops around the circle with slip stitches.
title: Rnd 1
